_disclaimer: DEMO CONTENT — synthetic data for local development and demos only. Not derived from real assessments.
title: Supply Chain Attestation Policy
content:
title: Supply Chain Attestation Policy
metadata:
  type: Policy
  id: supply-chain-attestation
  version: 1.0.0
  gemara-version: 1.0.0
  description: >-
    Supply chain security policy requiring SBOM generation, build provenance,
    dependency scanning, and artifact signing for all release artifacts.
  author:
    id: complytime
    name: ComplyTime
    type: Software Assisted
  mapping-references:
    - id: supply-chain-controls
      title: Supply Chain Security Controls
      version: 1.0.0
      description: Control catalog for supply chain attestation

contacts:
  responsible:
    - name: Release Engineering
  accountable:
    - name: Security Team

scope:
  in:
    technologies:
      - Container Registries
      - CI/CD Pipelines
    users:
      - Release engineers

criteria:
  - id: SCA-1
    title: Generate SBOM for All Releases
    description: Every release artifact must have an accompanying SBOM in SPDX or CycloneDX format.
    catalog-ref: supply-chain-controls/SCA-1
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: SCA-1.01
        description: SBOM MUST be generated and published alongside every container image release.
        frequency: on-demand

  - id: SCA-2
    title: Produce Build Provenance
    description: Build provenance attestations must be generated using SLSA-compliant builders.
    catalog-ref: supply-chain-controls/SCA-2
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: SCA-2.01
        description: SLSA provenance attestation MUST be attached to every release artifact.
        frequency: on-demand

  - id: SCA-3
    title: Scan Dependencies for Vulnerabilities
    description: All direct and transitive dependencies must be scanned for known vulnerabilities.
    catalog-ref: supply-chain-controls/SCA-3
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: SCA-3.01
        description: Dependency scan MUST run in CI and block releases with critical/high CVEs.
        frequency: daily

  - id: SCA-4
    title: Sign Release Artifacts
    description: All release artifacts must be cryptographically signed using Sigstore cosign.
    catalog-ref: supply-chain-controls/SCA-4
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: SCA-4.01
        description: Container images MUST be signed with cosign before promotion to production registry.
        frequency: on-demand

adherence:
  evaluation-methods:
    - type: automated
      description: Cosign verification, Trivy scanning, and SLSA provenance checks
      executor:
        id: cosign-verifier
        name: Cosign Verifier
        type: Software
  assessment-plans:
    - id: SCA-1.01
      requirement-id: SCA-1.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: automated
          executor:
            id: cosign-verifier
    - id: SCA-2.01
      requirement-id: SCA-2.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: automated
          executor:
            id: cosign-verifier
    - id: SCA-3.01
      requirement-id: SCA-3.01
      frequency: daily
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: automated
          executor:
            id: trivy
    - id: SCA-4.01
      requirement-id: SCA-4.01
      frequency: on-demand
      evaluation-methods:
        - type: automated
          executor:
            id: cosign-verifier
